title: Ghostwood Pale Oak Planks
description: Changes Pale Oak Plank textures to look like Blocks for Builders' original Ghostwood textures.
body:
Changes all textures that use Pale Oak planks to resemble the original Ghostwood Planks texture from Blocks for Builders instead:
- Pale Oak Planks
- Pale Oak Stairs
- Pale Oak Slab
- Pale Oak Fence
- Pale Oak Fence Gate
- Pale Oak Presure Plate
- Pale Oak Button
- Pale Oak Sign
- Pale Oak Boat
- Pale Oak Chest Boat
